flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at East Central College rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.2k → $7.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at East Central College fell 15% between 2006 and 2009 (27.5% → 23.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at East Central College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at East Central College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (58.1% → 66.7%).
